hero.title: Non-standard web products,
hero.hook: A team of engineers, not salespeople.
hero.sub: Turnkey MVPs, AI integrations and business-process automation. I connect what doesn't connect out of the box — and make business simpler.

widget.mvpSub: from brief to a working product

pillars.speedD: An MVP in days, not months. While others write specs, you already have a working prototype to show and test.
pillars.customD: I specialize in interesting, atypical problems — not template sites. What others call “impossible” is my profile.
pillars.autoD: I connect systems that don't talk out of the box. Ready automated processes in one click — without months of integration.

trust.caption: Businesses across Ukraine, Europe and the US run on solutions I built

services.heading: What businesses come with
services.mvpD: From idea to a working product in days, not months.
services.aiD: Chatbots, assistants and AI features inside your product.
services.autoD: I connect services and kill the busywork — n8n, APIs, webhooks.
services.fullstackD: Front + back, turnkey. Vue, Nest, databases.

process.heading: From idea to launch — in days, not months
process.briefD: A short talk: the task, the goal, the budget. No multi-page specs.
process.protoD: A working prototype, not just mockups — clickable and demo-ready.
process.devD: Short sprints — you see progress practically every day.
process.launchD: We ship to production, and I stay around to grow the product.

products.heading: I don't only build to order
products.leadbox: A systems connector with ready-made automations. Plug in your sources — and instantly get dedup control, lead routing and end-to-end analytics.
products.tcounter: Counts offline foot traffic and auto-calculates the profitability of a retail location.
products.revita: An app for rehabilitation centers: class bookings, records and analytics.

cases.heading: What I closed for businesses
cases.note: Real problems I solved with my solutions. Companies stay unnamed (NDA) — I show the essence and the result.
cases.c1P: Leads poured in from the site, Instagram, chat and Facebook forms — managers hunted them across tabs and lost some.
cases.c1S: Connected every source into one CRM, no code, in 4 steps. Fields fill themselves — every lead is instantly in play.
cases.c1L: of managers' time on lead handling
cases.c2P: Duplicate contacts, leads lost to CRM limits, hot leads landing on the wrong manager.
cases.c2S: Dedup control by phone, a lead queue, and routing to the right manager by the company's rules.
cases.c3P: Budget poured into ads, but it was unclear which source drove deals and which only empty leads.
cases.c3S: Won deals with their value flow into Google Analytics with utm — every channel's ROI is visible without a dedicated analyst.
cases.c3L: of every ad source, made visible

journal.sub: I collect and compress the most interesting from automation, AI and product development — short and to the point.
journal.pageSub: News, cases, tools and features from automation, AI and product development — short and to the point.
journal.p1T: n8n added native AI agents to workflows
journal.p1E: You can now build agents right inside n8n — what it means for business automation.

journal.p2E: Connected systems that don't talk out of the box and killed manual lead transfer.

journal.p3E: Compared two AI tools on a real task — where each saves time.

about.role: FOUNDER · LEAD ENGINEER · HEAD OF DIGITAL
about.bio1: 10+ years of commercial experience — logistics, fintech, social networks, ERP. FrontAngel is a brand with a team behind it, and I'm the lead engineer and the face personally accountable for your result.
about.bio2: You work directly with the person running the project — no middle managers, no broken telephone.

faq.heading: Frequent questions
faq.sub: Didn't find an answer? Write me — I'll reply personally.
faq.q1: How long does an MVP take?
faq.a1: Depends on scope. Simple MVPs — from a few days. On the call I assess the task and give a clear range before we start, no surprises.
faq.q2: How much does a project cost?
faq.a2: Depends on scope and complexity. After the brief I give a fixed range or an hourly estimate — no hidden fees.
faq.a3: Happy to sign an NDA. On the site cases are anonymous — only the type of task and the result.
faq.a4: You do. All code and access go to the client — no vendor lock-in.
faq.a5: Directly with me, no middle managers. A convenient messenger + short demos along the way.

ctaBand.heading: Got a non-standard idea?
ctaBand.sub: Tell me about the task — on a free call we'll figure out how to do it fast and non-standard.

footer.tagline: Engineering studio: web apps, MVP, automation, AI.
